screen.ratonera.transferir_pendiente: The transfer UI will be implemented in Phase 3.
message.ratonera.error_cantidad_invalida: Enter a valid amount greater than 0.
message.ratonera.error_destino_propio: You cannot transfer money to yourself.
message.ratonera.error_transferencia_sal: You already have a transfer waiting for a response.
message.ratonera.error_fondos_insuficien: Insufficient funds. You need %s Q and only have %s Q.
message.ratonera.error_billetes_exactos: You do not have an exact bill combination to send %s Q.
message.ratonera.error_solicitud_invalid: That transfer request is not valid.
message.ratonera.error_solicitud_expirad: That transfer request is no longer available.
message.ratonera.transferencia_solicitad: Transfer of %s Q sent to %s. The money is being held until they respond.
message.ratonera.transferencia_recibida: %s wants to transfer %s Q to you. Check the confirmation window.
message.ratonera.transferencia_rechazada: %s rejected your transfer of %s Q. The money was refunded.
message.ratonera.transferencia_cancelada: %s's transfer of %s Q was cancelled because they disconnected.
Your transfer to %s for %s Q was cancelled and refunded.
message.ratonera.transferencia_sobrante_: Your inventory had no room for all the bills. %s Q were dropped on the ground.
screen.ratonera.shop_sin_precio: The shop has no price set
message.ratonera.shop_sin_stock: The shop has no stock available.
message.ratonera.shop_sin_precio: The shop has no price set.
message.ratonera.shop_owner_compra: You own this shop. You cannot buy from yourself.
message.ratonera.shop_fondos_insuficient: You do not have enough quetzales to buy this item.
message.ratonera.shop_error_cobro: Could not complete the purchase. Check you have exact bills.
message.ratonera.shop_suelo: Your inventory was full. The item dropped on the ground.
